summary: Tested Pet Life OS Admin Quick Tools feature: Backend auto-runs product tag enhancement on startup, Admin Dashboard has Quick Tools section with 4 buttons (Enhance All Tags, Seed All Products, Products CSV, Services CSV). All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Quick Tools feature fully implemented and tested. Backend startup auto-runs product tag enhancement (logs show 'Running Product Intelligence Engine for tag enhancement...' and 'Product tags already enhanced (2004 unified, 942 products)'). Admin Dashboard has Quick Tools section with 4 items: Enhance All Tags button (purple gradient, data-testid='enhance-tags-btn'), Seed All Products button (outline, data-testid='seed-products-btn'), Products CSV download link, Services CSV download link.

backend_startup_auto_enhancement.details: Backend logs show 'Running Product Intelligence Engine for tag enhancement...' on startup, followed by 'Product tags already enhanced (2004 unified, 942 products)'

admin_quick_tools_section.details: Quick Tools section visible in Admin Dashboard with sparkle icon

enhance_all_tags_button.details: Purple gradient button with Tags icon, 'Enhance All Tags' text, 'Pillar, Breed, Size' subtitle, data-testid='enhance-tags-btn'

seed_all_products_button.details: Outline button with Database icon, 'Seed All Products' text, 'All Pillars' subtitle, data-testid='seed-products-btn'

products_csv_download.details: Link to /api/admin/export/unified-products-csv with Download icon and 'Products CSV' text

services_csv_download.details: Link to /api/admin/export/services-csv with Download icon and 'Services CSV' text

api_seed_all.details: POST /api/admin/seed-all returns 200 OK with pillar seeding results

api_unified_products_csv.details: GET /api/admin/export/unified-products-csv returns CSV with pillar, size_tags, breed_tags columns

api_services_csv.details: GET /api/admin/export/services-csv returns CSV with service data
